headline: Stifel Backs Cooper Companies (COO) as CooperSurgical Sale Talks Progress
summary: Cooper Companies Inc (NASDAQ:COO) is one of the best stocks to buy according to Billionaire Barry Rosenstein. This stock is backed by 49 hedge funds, and analysts see the stock rising at least 17% from its current price in the next 12 months. On June 12, Stifel reiterated a Buy rating on Cooper Companies Inc […]
